about.title: About — Ellie Hallaron
about.meta_description: Learn more about Ellie Hallaron, dark mafia romance author of The Syndicate series. Sign up for her newsletter.

books.title: Ellie Hallaron's Books
books.meta_description: The Syndicate Series by Ellie Hallaron — a four-book dark mafia romance following four dangerous brothers.

shop.title: Shop — Ellie Hallaron
shop.meta_description: Buy The Syndicate Series by Ellie Hallaron. Available on Amazon, Barnes & Noble, and Ingram. Signed copies coming soon.

connect.title: Connect — Ellie Hallaron
connect.meta_description: Connect with Ellie Hallaron on TikTok, Instagram, Goodreads, and Amazon. Sign up for her newsletter for exclusive updates.

trivia.title: Trivia — Ellie Hallaron
trivia.meta_description: Test your knowledge of Ellie Hallaron's dark mafia romance universe. Play the trivia quiz and compete on the leaderboard.
